text: Aquality in Universitas Mahakarya Asia E-learning System using McCall Method Abstract Universitas Mahakarya Asia (UMA) as one of the higher education institutions which implement learning system remotely by utilizing electronic-learning system, namely e-learning.unmaha.ac.id. As a developing country Indonesia has numerous universities whose main goals are providing education services. In this case, how can UMA develop the quality of learning system through e-learning system so that it is effective and corresponds to learning goals which are required. Here, the authors carried out research to determine the quality of learning system on UMA using McCall quality criteria which consists of six aspects, namely: correctness, reliability, efficiency, integrity, usability and maintainability with the achievement of 79.6%. From the results, it is obtained that reliability and integrity are high while the correctness of the material and maintainability need to be improved. So, further improvement is needed so that the correctness of the material and usability can be improved and also to help students feel easy in using the system. Keywords: E-learning quality, McCall, Universitas Mahakarya Asia. Abstrak Universitas Mahakarya Asia (UMA) merupakan salah satu Perguruan Tinggi (PT) yang mengembangkan sistem belajar-mengajar dari jarak yang jauh dengan menggunakan sistem electronic-learning yaitu e-learning.unmaha.ac.id. Indonesia merupakan negara berkembang dengan banyaknyaPT yang berusaha memberikan layanan pendidikan. Bagaimana Universitas Mahakarya Asia dapat meningkatkan kualitas belajar-mengajar secara online melalui sistem e-learning yang dapat mencapai tujuan pendidikan yang diminta. Penelitian ini dilaksanakan untuk mengukur kualitas sistem belajar-mengajar di UMA menggunakan McCall quality criteria yaitu; tiga kriteria ketepatan, ketidgesan, efisiensi, ketergesaran dan keterwakilan, keterdayaan, kegunaan dan kemudahan. Besar hasil penelitian ini adalah 79,6 %. Hasil penelitian ini terpapar ketidgesan dan ketergesaran yang tergolong besar, sedangkan hal ketepatan yang harus ditingkatkan dan juga yang harus ditingkatkan yaitu kemudian dengan harapan dapat meningkatkan kegunaan belajar mengajar yang membuat m Murphy Student Universitas Mahakarya Asia
